productDisplayName: Puma Men's Whirlwind Black White Shoe
description: Composition:Black, white shoes made of suede/mesh uppers with rubber outsolesThis running shoe from the puma 1980's archives has a straightforward design and cushioned construction, for maximum comfort and performance. Suede and mesh uppers provide lightweight feel and breathability. The lace-up closure ensures a snug Fit. The cushioned midsoles give comfort and support while the rubber outsoles provide maximum traction.
